author: Brandjuh
description: Fire station management and incident response mini-game for Red Discord Bot.
install_msg:
Thanks for installing FireStationCommand.

Use `[p]fsc start` to create your first station, then use `[p]fsc status`, `[p]fsc station`, `[p]fsc recruit`, `[p]fsc shop`, and `[p]fsc mission` to play.

This cog is still in active development. Check the changelog for known issues and upcoming work.
short: Fire station management and incident response mini-game
name: FireStationCommand
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores user IDs, station progress, vehicles, staff counts, active mission state, and local fallback credits when the bank cog cannot be used.
